entity.summary: Multi-chain decentralized trading and liquidity hub combining spot token swaps, concentrated-liquidity automated market making, perpetual trading, liquidity provision, limit-order and TWAP functions, and cross-chain execution surfaces.
entity.notes: Current first-party website exposes spot and perpetual trading, AMM and multichain functions, and links the live DEX surface. Current documentation describes the Algebra Integral concentrated-liquidity DEX architecture. No exact launch date or legal jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: Honeypot Finance official platform
evidence.notes: Current first-party website exposes spot swaps, AMM liquidity, perpetual trading, multichain trading, limit-order and TWAP functions, and links the public DEX application.

evidence.title: Honeypot DEX documentation
evidence.notes: First-party documentation describes the Algebra Integral concentrated-liquidity DEX, dynamic fees, TWAP oracle, farming, liquidity management, swaps, and flash-loan functionality.
